zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Durward於大約1242年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾時，她的父親Alan Durward49歲，母親Marjory of Scotland31歲。她於1270年與William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1275年之後在英國英格蘭，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。

zh-hans.Groby, Hinckley and Bosworth Borough, Le: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾格洛比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Durward于大约1242年出生在苏格兰培爾阿爾时，她的父亲Alan Durward49岁，母亲Marjory of Scotland31岁。她于1270年与William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1275年之后在英国英格兰，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。

nameMeanings.name: Durward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dorward
meanings: English and Scottish (Angus and Fife): occupational name from Older Scots, Middle English dor(e)ward ‘doorkeeper, porter’ (Old English duru-weard). In medieval Scotland the office of the king's doorward, Hostiarius regis, was hereditary and of considerable honor. The specific surname still common around Arbroath is probably from the office of doorward of the Abbey. The 13th-century royal ushers or doorwards of Scotland were based at Lundie in Angus.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Durward was born about 1242, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Alan Durward, was 49 and her mother, Marjory of Scotland, was 31. She married William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland in 1270. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1275, in England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Durward est née environ 1242, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Alan Durward, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Marjory of Scotland, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland en 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1275, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Durward um 1242 in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alan Durward 49 und ihre Mutter Marjory of Scotland 31. Sie hat 1270 William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1275 in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Durward è nata il circa 1242 nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alan Durward, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Marjory of Scotland, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland nel 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1275, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Groby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Durwardが約1242年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで生まれた時，父Alan Durwardは49歳，母Marjory of Scotlandは31歳であった。1270年にWilliam de Ferrers Constable of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1275年以後にイギリスイギリスで死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Durward(이)가 대략 1242년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan Durward(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjory of Scotland(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1270년 William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 그로비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Durward nasceu aproximadamente 1242, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alan Durward, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Marjory of Scotland, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland em 1270. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 1275, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Durward родилась около 1242 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alan Durward было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory of Scotland, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland в 1270 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1275 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.Abt 1242–Aft 1275: e tusa o le 1242–ina ua ma'ea le 1275

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Durward nació aproximadamente 1242, en Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Alan Durward, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Marjory of Scotland, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William de Ferrers Constable of Scotland en 1270. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1275, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
